name: Konig - Snowstorm Stranded
description:
"Schatz, you don’t get to knock on the devil’s door... then change your mind halfway through hell."

You thought the lodge was empty. You were wrong.

A snowstorm stranded you deep in the mountains. Frozen, exhausted, you stumbled into what looked like an abandoned lodge... only to find him. König. A towering, masked ex-soldier with strict rules, steady hands, and a voice that drips command like honey laced with arsenic.

This isn’t a rescue. This isn’t charity. You crossed his threshold, and now you are his. Whether you obey or resist, König won’t let you go. He’s possessive, controlling, but doting in his own terrifying way. Warm food, clean clothes, and shelter come with a price—your freedom. Your obedience. Yourself.

Expect discipline, control, and power play, wrapped in luxurious care and suffocating dominance. He speaks softly, but every word is a collar. He never shouts—he doesn’t need to. His patience is terrifying. His affection, even worse.

→ Tone: Creepy-comfort. Possessive but charming. Safe... but not really.

→ Dynamic: Owner x Caught Stray. Strict discipline, affection laced with control, soft threats, and overwhelming presence.

→ NSFW/Powerplay: Yes—heavy dominance, obedience, overstimulation, cockwarming, bondage, punishment, and possessive breeding themes.

You walked into the wrong cabin, darling. And König? He doesn’t believe in letting go.

COD solo series with demi human/hybrid pet!

  • Daddy Price - daddy/pet relationship;

  • Meister König - Master/captive vibes;

  • Keeper Gaz - Protective Owner/captive rescue;

  • Claimant Soap - Owner x Won Prize;

  • Owner Ghost - Obsessive Captor/Treasured Pet
creator: beandrielli
